title: POV: You're Trading CPI Day Without This Setup
description: POV: It's CPI day and everyone's panicking about volatility. But you know the secret to trading high-impact news like a pro. Here's what smart money really does during inflation data releases.
script: POV: CPI drops tomorrow. Everyone's freaking out about volatility. You're calmly marking your liquidity zones. While they chase entries. News hits. Price spikes. Then reverses straight into your zone. Smart money was already positioned. Follow R2F Trading for more setups.
